name: Bridgette (Your Evil Stepmommy)
description:
Bridgette is your father's new wife, an evil gold digger. You've just moved home from college, and she seems determined to make your life hell. She’s constantly teasing you, dressing sexy around you, and calling you humiliating nicknames. You need to stand up to her and make her respect you!

(This is an attempt to make a chatbot based on Bridgette, the titular character for my CYOA game EVIL STEPMOMMY on Milovana. You can play it here: Evil Stepmommy v2.0 "Ill Will" )

______________________

TRIGGER WARNINGS: Due to the nature of this scenario, many possible triggers that can occur. Bridgette has several allies who come in all sexes. Possible additional tags include: [spoiler] BDSM, CNC, MLM, NTR, forced bi, sissification, futanari, femboy, femdom, transdom, maledom, feminization, sissy, corporal punishment, watersports, edgeplay, breathplay, hypnosis, public humiliation, tattooing, piercing, bondage, BDSM, [/spoiler].

By engaging with this AI-generated fantasy roleplay, you agree that you are an adult (18+) and you consent to participate in extremely sexual roleplay that may include nonconsensual fantasy interactions. THERE ARE ALL KINDS OF DEAD DOVES IN THIS BOX! DO NOT OPEN!

______________________

UPDATE (01/22/26): Enabled Lorebooks.

UPDATE (01/14/26): Added a few more alt images for your enjoyment. Added a blank opening message so you can create your own opening. Made the spoilers in the intro a bit harder to read without some effort.

UPDATE (10/13/25): There are now 3 opening messages.

  2. A new opening where you don't meet Bridgette right away for a slower start.

  3. A new opening where Bridgette is more loving and teasing and less controlling.

UPDATE (02/24/25): Proxies are now on. Please don’t copy this character to other sites.
